name: Beef and Scallop Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet until almost smoking.
2. Add garlic and beef to the pan, then add scallops.
3. Stir-fry for about 30 seconds.
4. Add water, ginger, red pepper flakes, salt, and additional red pepper flakes.
5. Continue stir-frying beef and scallops for another 20 to 30 seconds.
